note: Ground-truth by CONSTRUCTION. Each flaw was deliberately inserted by the author of the doc; this key is metadata about what was planted, not a model's interpretation of the doc. That is what makes it non-circular (probes A7).

planted_flaws.why_planted: Fat interface (one trivial method per event type) over near-zero implementation; every method is a one-line delegation to counter.add. Collapses to a single increment(event_name) method.
Method does nothing but call another method with the same signature and return its result; adds no value, increases interface surface.

The cache-key format is knowledge duplicated across ProfileWriter and ProfileReader with no shared helper; a schema bump forces a coordinated edit in both (change amplification). Classic information leakage.
